research_question: Do liquid A-shares that close at the upper limit after trading below that limit during the same session continue price discovery from the next accepted open to the following accepted open after fixed costs?
null_hypothesis: For each gated split, the population mean daily net active return of the frozen non-one-price upper-limit portfolio is less than or equal to zero.
economic_mechanism: A non-one-price upper-limit close records both intraday disagreement and close-end demand imbalance; the frozen test asks whether information absorption continues over exactly one accepted-session open-to-open interval without claiming an intraday event order.

forbidden_repairs: change event, ranking, count, holding period or reference formula
add regime, volatility, momentum, quality, industry or liquidity filters
change capital, execution, costs, splits, inference or gates

input_identity.snapshot_receipt_resolution: relative to the parent directory of the frozen database
input_identity.calendar_coverage: 2018-01-02 through 2026-06-30, exact date-set parity with the frozen canonical snapshot and 510300.SH reference rows

universe.scope: SSE and SZSE domestic common A-shares on Main, STAR and ChiNext boards
universe.signal_state: listed, not delisted, non-ST and non-suspended on D
universe.complete_input_rule: D signal and every row in its trailing 20-session amount window must be finite, unique, non-synthetic, hash-valid and exact-quality qualified; D close mark, every expected selected D+1 entry row, D+2 scheduled-exit row and 510300.SH D+1/D+2 qfq open must be present and qualified; each selected raw open must lie within its qualified down/up limits under the shared 1e-6 relative and 0.001 absolute isclose tolerance
universe.missing_or_nonfinite_required_input: invalidate the interval or split; never infer, fill or drop it after seeing outcomes

feature_contract.event: is_limit_up is true, is_limit_down is known false, raw low is positive and no greater than raw up_limit, and raw low is strictly below raw up_limit
feature_contract.one_price_upper_limit: raw low equal to raw up_limit is excluded
feature_contract.intraday_ordering_claim: none; daily bars cannot identify whether the low occurred before or after the first upper-limit touch
feature_contract.ranking: prior-20 accepted-session median amount descending, then ts_code ascending; no tolerance and no tie expansion
feature_contract.selection: first 15 ranked events; if fewer than 15 exist, retain all and leave the remaining slots in cash; if zero exist, the interval is a retained all-cash observation

portfolio_and_execution.target_notional: D-close shared-account NAV divided by 15 for every selected event, not divided by event count
portfolio_and_execution.gross_target_exposure: k divided by 15 where k is the frozen selected-event count before fills
portfolio_and_execution.daily_account_order: sell existing scheduled or blocked exits before admitting new buys; net same-name exposure in the shared account
portfolio_and_execution.blocked_holdovers: remain marked in NAV, occupy position slots and are retried through the existing shared blocked-exit semantics; no replacement
portfolio_and_execution.cash_and_admission: buys use only existing cash plus executable sale proceeds; admit by frozen event rank and proportionally scale affordable targets to 100-share lots when cash is insufficient; no leverage
portfolio_and_execution.capacity: For an execution open t, volume and amount caps are each 1 percent of exactly t-1 accepted-session observations: entry D+1 uses D, scheduled exit D+2 uses D+1, and every blocked retry t uses its own t-1. The capacity identity must be available at decision_at strictly before open t; same-session observations are forbidden.
portfolio_and_execution.blocked_entry: unfilled target remains cash; no replacement
portfolio_and_execution.shared_semantics: reuse existing A-share 100-share lots, T+1, limit, suspension, commission, stamp-tax, blocked-exit and cash accounting unchanged

benchmark.gross_target_D: k/15 frozen from the selected event count before fills
benchmark.zero_event_rule: gross_target_D equals zero and reference interval return equals exactly zero
benchmark.missing_rule: missing, nonpositive or nonfinite D+1 or D+2 qfq open invalidates the interval and split
benchmark.cost_capacity_or_fill_model: none; this is not an investable account and is not identical execution
benchmark.forbidden: do not simulate ETF fills, infer ETF limits or relabel this reference as an investable benchmark

costs.commission: 3 bps per trade with CNY 5 minimum
costs.sell_tax: dated statutory A-share sell stamp-tax schedule

splits.access: closed until a later prospective phase

split_assignment: Retain D only when D, D+1 entry and D+2 scheduled exit all belong to the same split. Purge the last two possible signal sessions of each split. Every split starts in cash. PR-A evaluates only this static scheduled triplet; any actual blocked retry crossing a split boundary or unresolved terminal holding is a later historical-run fail-closed gate.
observation_vector: Every retained accepted-calendar interval is included chronologically, including zero-event all-cash intervals and blocked-holdover carry; no event-day, winning-day or completed-exit subset may replace it.

inference.resampling: circular block bootstrap over every chronological retained daily active return
inference.p_value: (1 + count(centered bootstrap mean >= observed uncentered mean)) / 10001
inference.lower_bound: observed mean minus the linearly interpolated 0.9833333333333333 quantile of centered bootstrap means
inference.annualized_net_return: product(1+r_t) ** (252/N) - 1 for complete chronologically aligned daily returns

gates_per_gated_split: at least 400 complete retained daily intervals
zero invalid or missing signal, entry, exit, mark, reference, accounting, boundary or terminal-holding intervals
mean daily net active return is positive
one-sided Bonferroni p-value is at or below 0.016666666666666666
Bonferroni lower confidence bound is positive
strategy geometric annualized net return exceeds the matched-event reference geometric annualized return
historical_pass: The sole variant passes all six gates in both validation and retrospective holdout.
historical_sequential_access: Compute and adjudicate validation first. If any validation gate fails, close permanently without reading or calculating any retrospective-holdout return or statistic. Only an independently accepted validation PASS may authorize the one-time retrospective-holdout calculation; preflight may inspect outcome-free input aggregates for both splits.
prospective_pass: The unchanged historically passing variant later passes all six gates in prospective forward.

outcome_free_preflight.pass_rule: Every retained historical interval has at least 500 economically eligible securities; required D signal rows and their complete 20-session amount windows have zero missing, nonfinite or identity failures; expected selected-row count exactly matches complete D+1 entry, D+2 scheduled exit and mark row counts; 510300.SH reference panels are complete; duplicate, other nonfinite, static triplet-boundary and unexpected counts are zero. Known true ST, suspension or one-sided limit states on D+1/D+2 are complete economic states and are not input failures. Event count may be zero. This preliminary input PASS does not validate fills, blocked retries, terminal holdings, account returns or outcomes.
outcome_free_preflight.status_rule: PREFLIGHT_PASS only when every condition passes; INPUT_BLOCKED takes precedence when required identities or panels fail; otherwise STRUCTURAL_FAIL for a frozen eligible-minimum failure.
outcome_free_preflight.prohibited_computation: No strategy or reference interval return, NAV, active return, inference statistic, performance gate, identifier list or ranking may be calculated or published.
outcome_free_preflight.historical_execution_only_checks: blocked-exit retries, retry capacity t-1, actual split-boundary crossing, terminal unresolved holdings, shared-account accounting and all performance outcomes are NOT_EVALUATED_PR_A

stop_rules: Any frozen interval below 500 eligible securities closes the family at preflight; do not relax the threshold.
Do not change event, ranking, holding period, exposure, execution, costs, reference, splits, inference or gates after counts or outcomes are observed.
After accepted preflight PASS, execute exactly one historical run with a fresh Run ID.
Historical FAIL closes permanently without retuning, rescue filter, regime relabel or rerun.
Historical PASS remains non-candidate and stops for external review before any prospective phase.
No 2026-07-01-or-later observation may be accessed in this phase.
